_comment: Configuration for inventory history tracking and stale listing detection.

stale_detection._comment_stale: A listing not seen in any extraction run for this many days is flagged Change_Type=REMOVED and Review_Status=Needs Review.

_comment_tracked: Changes to any of these fields trigger Change_Type=UPDATED and record Updated_At.
_comment_key: Composite key used to match records across extraction runs. A record with the same key across runs is the same property unit.

photos._comment: Photos for a listing live under photos/listings/<MH_ID>/. The Photos field stores relative paths: ["MRH-0001/img1.jpg", "MRH-0001/img2.jpg"]
